name: Veronica Swift
abstract: Veronica O'Brien (born May 14, 1994), known professionally as Veronica Swift, is an American jazz and bebop singer.

concerts.label: Forever Django: Passing the Family Torch
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: You know there’s a singer in Manhattan named Veronica Swift. She is the next big thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019
